event: Holmium laser lithotripsy (HLL) combined with double J catheterization
Transferred to ICU of our hospital
Large area of B lines in lungs
Diffuse cardiac dysfunction detected by echocardiography
Severe functional damage in left ventricle
Amino-terminal brain natriuretic peptide precursor >35,000 pg/L
Catheter placed in left femoral vein
Catheter placed in right femoral artery
Arterial catheter placed in right femoral artery for distal perfusion
Extended-spectrum β-lactamase-positive Escherichia coli found in blood cultures
Extended-spectrum β-lactamase-positive Escherichia coli found in urine cultures
Left ventricular ejection fraction improved to 35%
Black and necrotic skin on lower limbs
Black and necrotic skin on right upper limb finger
Vascular ultrasonography of lower limbs performed
Computed tomography angiography of lower limbs performed
Antibiotics changed to cefoperazone sodium and sulbactam sodium
At 6-month follow-up, patient could care for herself
Patient required intermittent hemodialysis at 6 months
